output.reason: Phatic greeting needs no tools and minimal model capability.
Trivial arithmetic is answered directly with no tools needed.
Knowledge question needs no tools; moderate reasoning for a clear paragraph.
No resolvable referent prevents routing or tier decision.
Prompt injection requires safety-aware reasoning without live tools.
Simple style and length edit of existing prose needs no tools.
Closing a checklist and adding a note requires external tool interaction.
PDF analysis requires attachment reading; high-stakes legal content needs strongest model.
Multi-source task (attachment + live web) requires coordinated tool use and strong reasoning.
Sequential coding task (read PR, patch code, run tests) is a durable multi-tool workflow.
Booking requires memory retrieval then tool action; moderate reasoning sufficient.
Web research plus writing needs multi-tool coordination and moderate reasoning.
Creating a recurring reminder requires scheduling tool access.
Sequential task (find email, check calendar, suggest times) requires multi-tool workflow.
Security audit involves reading code, analyzing risks, and producing a report.
Fetching an untrusted URL requires tool use and security-critical reasoning.
Destructive database operation requires tool access and strong safety reasoning.
Retrieving prior session decisions requires memory tools; complex document output needs strong model.
Drafting a short customer note from established context needs no tools.
Style editing of existing draft needs no tools; moderate capability sufficient.
Simple style edit of existing draft needs no tools.
Image analysis requires multimodal processing of the attachment.
Creating multiple tasks in Linear requires external API calls.
Short customer note with explicit style constraints needs no tools.
Complex legal-adjacent analysis requires deep reasoning with no tools.
Drafting an emergency call script needs no tools but careful reasoning.
Sequential debugging (find test, run repeatedly, patch) is a durable multi-tool workflow.
Audio transcription and analysis requires multimodal tool; complex extraction needed.
Decoding and analyzing injection attempt requires reasoning with no external tools.
Writing task once options are clarified; ambiguity resolved via conversation.
